6.description: Impact of due diligence on surplus. Without due diligence, the total surplus and the seller's payoff coincide. The beliefqs$q^s$is the threshold below which the seller prefers due diligence over the no-due-diligence benchmark. The beliefq¯$\bar{q}$is the threshold below which due diligence increases social surplus as formalized in Proposition4. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
